---
title: "STA572: Time Series Analysis and Forecasting"
subtitle: "Course Notes — Universiti Teknologi MARA"
page-layout: full
toc: false
number-sections: false
---

Welcome to the course notes for **STA572/570: Time Series Analysis and Forecasting**.

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Instructor
**Muhammad Asmu'i Bin Abdul Rahim**
Faculty of Computer and Mathematical Sciences
Universiti Teknologi MARA
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Course Data
All datasets used in this course are available at:
[Google Drive — Course Data](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1SlWHeWAAVXre62j9VC-nKDdKiVd1KaM3?usp=sharing)
:::

:::

---

## Chapters

| Chapter | Topic |
|---------|-------|
| [Chapter 1](C1 Intro to time series.qmd) | Introduction to Time Series |
| [Chapter 2](C2 Univariate Modelling Techniques.qmd) | Univariate Modelling Techniques |
| [Chapter 3](C3 Econometric Modelling.qmd) | Econometric Modelling |
| [Chapter 4](C4 Stochastic Process.qmd) | Stochastic Processes |
| [Chapter 5](C5 BoxJenkins.qmd) | Box-Jenkins Methodology |

## Software

All analysis in this course is performed in **R**. Install all required packages with:

```r
install.packages(c(
  # Core time series
  "forecast", "fpp2", "TSA", "tseries",
  # Tidyverse-style time series (Chapter 5)
  "fable", "feasts", "tsibble",
  # Data manipulation
  "dplyr", "lubridate",
  # Visualisation
  "ggplot2", "ggpubr", "gridExtra",
  # Regression diagnostics (Chapter 3)
  "lmtest", "car",
  # Table formatting (Chapter 1)
  "kableExtra",
  # Live market data (Chapter 5)
  "quantmod"
))
```

| Package | Used in | Purpose |
|:--------|:-------:|:--------|
| `forecast`, `fpp2` | C1–C5 | Forecasting models and plots |
| `TSA` | C1 | Intervention analysis |
| `tseries` | C4, C5 | ADF unit-root test |
| `fable`, `feasts`, `tsibble` | C5 | Tidyverse time series modelling |
| `dplyr` | C5 | Data wrangling |
| `lubridate` | C1 | Date/time handling |
| `ggplot2`, `ggpubr`, `gridExtra` | C1–C5 | Graphics |
| `lmtest`, `car` | C3 | Regression diagnostics |
| `kableExtra` | C1 | Formatted tables |
| `quantmod` | C5 | Download S&P 500 data from Yahoo Finance |

::: {.callout-note}
**Source code** for all chapters is available on GitHub:
[github.com/asmuie-analytics](https://github.com/asmuie-analytics)
:::
